title: CPT World-Knowledge Record
description: One line of output/*_cpt.jsonl: real official text natively aligned to a time series, for mid-pretraining world-knowledge injection. See SCHEMA.md. NOTE: semantic rules not expressible in JSON Schema are enforced by validate.py, namely: <ts></ts> count == 1 (or == len(timeseries) when multi_series); channels sharing a freq must share a length (mixed-frequency channels may differ); optional-vocab fields (source/license/text_source/alignment) are warnings unless --strict.

text.description: Natural prose, no task instructions. Contains exactly one <ts></ts> (or len(timeseries) when multi_series is true).

timeseries.description: Channels. Channels sharing a freq are index-aligned and equal length; channels at different freqs may differ in length (mixed-frequency records).

values.description: Numeric observations in time order; null allowed for genuine gaps.

unit.description: snake_case channel label + unit. Distinct labels recommended but not required (a physical unit may recur across channels).

multi_series.description: If true, number of <ts></ts> must equal len(timeseries), binding in order; channels need not share length.

timestamps.description: Optional ISO-8601 timestamps parallel to channel values (same length).

source.description: Canonical URL of the originating report.

meta.description: Dataset-specific extras (season, ticker, gauge id, fiscal_quarter, ...).
